message:
refactor: apply clippy fixes, import reordering, and f64 comparison improvements

Replace assert_eq! on f64 values with epsilon-based comparisons to
satisfy clippy::float_cmp across evidence_sink, lab/network/config,
runtime/reactor/lab, net/dns/cache, and types/resource.

Alphabetize imports per Rust 2024 edition style in ~20 files, moving
std and crate imports into canonical order.

Convert unused-binding-in-test patterns to actual assertions in
partition, aggregator, types/symbol, service/retry, lab/network/config.

Apply map_or/map_or_else idiom, struct field initialization syntax,
and inline format args (format!("..{var}")) across the codebase.

Add targeted #[allow] attributes for legitimate clippy exceptions:
too_many_lines, cast_precision_loss, trivially_copy_pass_by_ref,
unnecessary_wraps, needless_range_loop, cast_sign_loss.

Replace Duration::from_millis(2000) with Duration::from_secs(2),
drop() instead of let _ = for unused futures, and const-block
assertions where applicable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
